Running: set -euo pipefail # Stop any old local testnet nodes pkill -f '/tmp/gc-realtest/.*/giltconsd' || true pkill -f 'build/giltconsd start --home /tmp/gc-realtest' || true sleep 1 BIN=/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/build/giltconsd BASE=/tmp/gc-realtest # Build peer list from node IDs with unique localhost P2P ports peers=\"\" for n in 0 1 2 3; do home=\""'$BASE/node$n/giltconsd" id="$($BIN tendermint show-node-id --home "$home")" p2p=$((26656 + n*10)) entry="${id}@127.0.0.1:${p2p}" if [ -z "$peers" ]; then peers="$entry"; else peers="$peers,$entry"; fi done echo "PEERS=$peers" for n in 0 1 2 3; do home="$BASE/node$n/giltconsd" cfg="$home/config/config.toml" app="$home/config/app.toml" rpc=$((26657 + n*10)) p2p=$((26656 + n*10)) abci=$((26658 + n*10)) pprof=$((6060 + n)) api=$((1317 + n*10)) grpc=$((9090 + n*10)) sed -i -E "s#''^proxy_app = '"\\\".*\\\"#proxy_app = \\\"tcp://127.0.0.1:"'${abci}'"\\\"#\" \""'$cfg" sed -i -E "/''^'"\\[rpc\\]/,/"'^'"\\[/{s#"'^laddr = '"\\\".*\\\"#laddr = \\\"tcp://0.0.0.0:"'${rpc}'"\\\"#}\" \""'$cfg" sed -i -E "s#''^pprof_laddr = '"\\\".*\\\"#pprof_laddr = \\\"localhost:"'${pprof}'"\\\"#\" \""'$cfg" sed -i -E "/''^'"\\[p2p\\]/,/"'^'"\\[/{s#"'^laddr = '"\\\".*\\\"#laddr = \\\"tcp://0.0.0.0:"'${p2p}'"\\\"#}\" \""'$cfg" sed -i -E "s#''^persistent_peers = '"\\\".*\\\"#persistent_peers = \\\""'${peers}'"\\\"#\" \""'$cfg" sed -i -E "/''^'"\\[api\\]/,/"'^'"\\[/{s#"'^address = '"\\\".*\\\"#address = \\\"tcp://0.0.0.0:"'${api}'"\\\"#}\" \""'$app" sed -i -E "/''^'"\\[grpc\\]/,/"'^'"\\[/{s#"'^address = '"\\\".*\\\"#address = \\\"localhost:"'${grpc}'"\\\"#}\" \""'$app" done # Show resulting critical lines for n in 0 1 2 3; do cfg="$BASE/node$n/giltconsd/config/config.toml" app="$BASE/node$n/giltconsd/config/app.toml" echo "=== node$n" rg -n "''^proxy_app|''^laddr =|''^pprof_laddr|''^persistent_peers" "$cfg" -n -S | sed -n '"'1,20p' rg -n \"\\[api\\]|\\[grpc\\]|"'^address =" "$app" -n -S | sed -n '"'1,20p' done
